name: SalesSignal
description: Real-time field sales conversation analysis for D2D and in-person reps. Wear your Omi during every pitch — SalesSignal detects objections as they happen, scores the deal, drafts your follow-up voicemail, and pushes a clean note to GoHighLevel or any CRM. Built for solar, roofing, insurance, and medical device reps who need to know exactly what to do next.
memory_prompt: A field sales representative is having an in-person conversation with a prospect. Listen for: objections raised by the prospect and how the rep responds, buying signals (interest, questions about pricing or timeline, positive reactions), competitor mentions, who the decision makers are, any pricing or timing discussion, and the overall outcome of the conversation. Capture all details that would help a sales manager coach the rep or help the rep follow up effectively.
author: ekawough

pricing.pro: $39/mo/rep — unlimited, objection detection, manager report, GHL sync
